history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, slightly distorted selfie of a young man lying down, eyes rolled back and tongue sticking out. He has short, dark hair and is shirtless. The background shows a pillow with a pink and purple checkered pattern, and a red cloth with a yellow pattern beneath it. The lighting is somewhat dim and direct, creating harsh shadows on his face. The overall mood is comical and slightly unsettling due to the exaggerated expression. The color palette is dominated by skin tones, red, pink, and purple.
